title: Citations, Freshness, Uncertainty, Accessibility, and Feedback · Code Recall
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs citations, freshness, uncertainty, accessibility, and feedback from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for accessible evidence-first answer interface after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Place citations at material claims and verify source ID, exact span, quotation fidelity, support, and link target.
Expose title, authority, effective date, version, retrieval time, supersession, conflict, and stale-state evidence without overwhelming the answer.
Make answers, citations, expandable excerpts, tables, confidence limits, loading, errors, and feedback keyboard and screen-reader operable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

options.text: The Rag Feedback Correction Loop record says accessible evidence-first answer interface looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Rag Feedback Correction Loop.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient Rag Feedback Correction Loop query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof. This does not satisfy Rag Feedback Correction Loop for accessible evidence-first answer interface.
The record names the assumption, applies Rag Feedback Correction Loop, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Feedback Correction Loop
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Feedback Correction Loop: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 3162 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to present claim-level citations, freshness, source inspection, keyboard access, and announced status; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Capture structured missing-source, wrong-source, unsupported-claim, stale, unsafe, inaccessible, and unhelpful feedback with review and correction lineage.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Feedback Correction Loop.
steps.why: Retrieving Rag Feedback Correction Loop through the concrete accessible evidence-first answer interface case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Feedback Correction Loop, keep Rag Feedback Correction Loop connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Capture structured missing-source, wrong-source, unsupported-claim, stale, unsafe, inaccessible, and unhelpful feedback with review and correction lineage.
